description: This pipeline processes 3D ROI data by first modifying their properties and then converting them into a label image, generating an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit image depending on the number of objects.

6868d232-cf2d-4d2d-94a8-c512537ad7fe.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
6868d232-cf2d-4d2d-94a8-c512537ad7fe.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

50be24fe-b7f3-4504-9999-c82fc4ddf9a5.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
50be24fe-b7f3-4504-9999-c82fc4ddf9a5.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI
